framing: Senior construction project manager applying to infrastructure megaproject role in UAE

jd.title: Senior Project Manager — Infrastructure

requirements.text: 15+ years of project management experience in large-scale infrastructure or civil engineering projects
Experience managing projects valued at USD 500M+ from concept through handover
Chartered Engineer (CEng) or Professional Engineer (PE) status
PMP certification from Project Management Institute
Experience with NEC or FIDIC contract forms
Knowledge of UAE building codes, Abu Dhabi Municipality (ADM) regulations, and Estidama sustainability requirements
Experience managing multi-disciplinary project teams of 20+
Proficiency in Primavera P6 and cost management tools
Experience with BIM (Building Information Modelling) Level 2+ implementation
BSc or MSc in Civil Engineering

responsibilities: Lead project delivery for USD 1.2B urban transit infrastructure programme
Manage integrated project team across design, construction, and commissioning phases
Oversee programme schedule, budget, risk register, and stakeholder reporting
Coordinate with Abu Dhabi Department of Municipalities and Transport (DMT) and regulatory authorities
Ensure compliance with Estidama Pearl Rating System and sustainability targets
Manage design consultant and contractor interfaces under NEC4 contract framework

expected_output.summary: Senior infrastructure project manager with 16 years of experience delivering large-scale transport and civil engineering projects across the GCC. Currently Programme Manager at WSP overseeing USD 800M highway expansion in Saudi Arabia. Previously delivered USD 350M interchange project for Abu Dhabi's Musaffah area. Chartered Civil Engineer (ICE) with PMP certification. Deep experience with NEC3/NEC4 contracts, Primavera P6, and GCC regulatory frameworks.

experience.title: Programme Manager — Highways
bullets: Led programme delivery for USD 800M highway expansion project in Jeddah (42km dual carriageway with 6 interchanges)
Managed integrated team of 35 engineers across design review, construction supervision, and contract administration
Administered NEC3 Engineering and Construction Contract with 4 main contractors
Maintained programme schedule in Primavera P6 with 8,000+ activities, achieving 94% schedule adherence
Managed risk register with 200+ active risks, conducting monthly quantitative risk analysis (QSRA)

experience.title: Senior Project Manager — Infrastructure
bullets: Delivered USD 350M Musaffah interchange and road network upgrade project for Abu Dhabi DoT
Coordinated with Abu Dhabi Municipality (ADM) and Estidama team on sustainability compliance (achieved Pearl 1 rating)
Managed multi-disciplinary team of 22 (civil, structural, MEP, landscape) through detailed design and construction
Administered FIDIC Red Book contracts with 3 construction packages
Resolved USD 28M in contractor claims through structured negotiation and DAB referrals

experience.title: Project Engineer (promoted from Graduate Engineer, 2011)
bullets: Progressed from graduate to project engineer on UK highways and rail infrastructure projects
Supported delivery of A14 Cambridge to Huntingdon improvement scheme (GBP 1.5B)
Developed proficiency in Primavera P6 and earned PMP certification (2013)

certifications: Chartered Civil Engineer (CEng MICE) — Institution of Civil Engineers
education: MSc Construction Project Management — Loughborough University (2007-2008)
BEng Civil Engineering — University of Leeds (2004-2007)

jd_requirements: 15+ years project management infrastructure civil engineering
Chartered Engineer CEng Professional Engineer PE
UAE building codes Abu Dhabi Municipality ADM Estidama
deliberate_flaws: No transit/metro experience — JD is for urban transit programme, candidate's experience is highways and interchanges
No BIM Level 2+ implementation experience (only exposure/coordination)
Highways experience is Saudi (MoMRAH), not Abu Dhabi-specific — ADM experience is from a prior role (2015-2020)
USD 800M project vs USD 1.2B scope — scaling gap
NEC4 experience limited (administered NEC3, JD implies NEC4 framework)
No cost management tool proficiency beyond Primavera P6 (no mention of Ecosys, CATO, or equivalent)

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
